source_name: DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics — consumption by sector

fields.unit_basis: Australian Energy Statistics reports electricity end-use in petajoules (PJ). Convert to TWh by dividing by 3.6 if needed; keep PJ as the published basis.
fields.primary_source_document: DCCEEW Australian Energy Update and Australian Energy Statistics — Table E (energy consumption by industry) and Table F (electricity by sector).
fields.keying_plan: Key annual PJ per sector for the most recent fiscal year published. Australian Energy Statistics is published annually around September; the data lags by ~12 months.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed annual electricity consumption per end-use sector from DCCEEW Australian Energy Statistics Table E/F. Australia's largest electricity-using sectors by PJ are typically manufacturing, residential, mining, and commercial services — order varies year to year.
citation: DCCEEW, Australian Energy Update and Australian Energy Statistics (energy.gov.au).
